---
title: README files
---

(Yes, again! READMEs are really useful.)

Recommendations for READMEs from the [day-to-day coding](../day-to-day/readmes.qmd) and [projects](../projects/readmes.qmd) sections still apply when developing a package, though there are a few additional items you may want to consider adding:

-   A short description of the software and the problem it solves
-   Installation instructions
-   The location of a guide to get started with the package
-   References in the scientific literature that support methods implemented in the package
-   Authors and contact info
-   How users can report issues with the package or suggestions for improvement
-   How to cite the package
